nodes.context: International 1% outlaw motorcycle club and principal support club of the Hells Angels.
Outlaw motorcycle club; Red Devils MC is its support club.
Now-defunct motorcycle club founded in Canada in the late 1940s.
East Coast based motorcycle club that the Original Red Devils MC patched over to in 2015.
Rival motorcycle club involved in dispute with Hells Angels.
Rival motorcycle club; a Red Devils member assaulted one of its members.
Motorcycle club involved in a gun battle with Red Devils and Hells Angels.
Motorcycle club involved in a gun battle with Red Devils and Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: The Red Devils Motorcycle Club ( RDMC ) is an international 1% outlaw motorcycle club and the principal support club of the Hells Angels.
edges.context: Red Devils MC is the principal support club of Hells Angels, working to protect them and do their 'dirty work'.

edges.evidence_quote: This club patched over to the East Coast based Bacchus in 2015.
edges.context: The Original Red Devils MC merged into Bacchus in 2015.

edges.evidence_quote: It is speculated that the ambush had to do with an ongoing dispute between the Hells Angels and the Bandidos Motorcycle Club.
edges.context: Red Devils MC is involved in a dispute with Bandidos as part of Hells Angels' rivalry.

edges.evidence_quote: Matthew Quattrociocchi, a member of the Red Devils MC Hamilton Charter, was charged with assault and possession of a weapon in June 2020 after he had beat a member of the rival Outlaws Motorcycle Club with a baseball bat.
edges.context: A Red Devils MC member assaulted a member of the Outlaws MC, indicating conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: On March 19, 2022, Red Devils and Hells Angels bikers were involved in a gun battle with members of the Infamous Ryders and La Familia motorcycle clubs.
edges.context: Red Devils MC engaged in a gun battle with Infamous Ryders.

edges.evidence_quote: On March 19, 2022, Red Devils and Hells Angels bikers were involved in a gun battle with members of the Infamous Ryders and La Familia motorcycle clubs.
edges.context: Red Devils MC engaged in a gun battle with La Familia.
